# Agent Instructions

## Build & Test

```bash
make build        # compiles ./paperless
go test ./cmd/... # unit tests (no running Paperless instance needed)
```

Always run tests after changes to `cmd/`.

## Generated Code — Do Not Edit

`api/paperless.gen.go` is generated by oapi-codegen from `schema/paperless.json`.
Edit the schema or `oapi-codegen.yaml`, then run `make generate-docker VERSION=vX.Y.Z`.

## Key Constraints

- `cmd/root.go` — `APIVersion` constant controls the `Accept: application/json; version=N` header sent on every request. Do not change this without a major version bump.
- `cmd/config.go` — config file at `~/.config/paperless-ngx-cli/config` must be written with `0600` permissions.
- Commits must be atomic (one topic per commit).

## More Detail

See [docs/development.md](docs/development.md) for project structure, release process, and Homebrew tap setup.
